# Netflix Clone Animesh
> A high-performance Netflix clone built by Animesh with React, Firebase, and TMDB API.

## Project Overview
This project is a fully-featured, production-ready clone of Netflix. It features buttery smooth UI, search functionality, custom profiles, and watchlist tracking.

## Technical Stack
- **Frontend**: React, Vite, TypeScript, TailwindCSS
- **Database & Auth**: Firebase (Authentication & Firestore)
- **Data Source**: TMDB API (The Movie Database)

## Author Information
- **Author**: Animesh Srivastava
- **Project URL**: [netflix-yt Repository](https://github.com/animeshsrivastava246/netflix-yt)

## Core Capabilities
- Stream movie and TV show data dynamically.
- Filter and search for movies by name, genre, and trending status.
- Personal watchlists saved to Firestore per user.
- Responsive design tailored for mobile, tablet, and desktop screens.
